pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 16: ROOM_URL="http://localhost:8080/ProductReview"; task.json description confirms meeting room named ProductReview
task.json description: 'set your display name to "Alex Johnson"'; setup_task.sh line 27: 'Set display name to 'Alex Johnson''
task_utils.sh line 4: JITSI_BASE_URL default; docker-compose.yml line 25: PUBLIC_URL=http://localhost:8080; setup_task.sh uses this URL for HTTP polling and Firefox navigation

privileged_info_summary: The task sets a display name 'Alex Johnson' in a local Jitsi Meet instance running on http://localhost:8080. The meeting room 'ProductReview' is accessed from the pre-join screen at http://localhost:8080/ProductReview. Jitsi Meet is deployed via Docker using stable-9753 images. The room name, display name, and localhost URL are all synthetic test data used for GUI task automation testing.
